## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why. Link issues. -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`make lint`)
- [ ] If a new alert: it has a `runbook_url` and the runbook exists
- [ ] If a metric change: label cardinality is bounded (see ADR-0007)
- [ ] If a significant decision: an ADR is added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
